phases.name: Controlled calendar corpus
requirements: same date controls year/month/day while hour changes
capture Mệnh score, total and all palace scores where available

phases.name: Broad discovery corpus
requirements: stratify by Cục, Mệnh branch, major-star configuration, VCD, Tuần/Triệt and Tứ Hóa

phases.name: Expert-reviewed benchmark
requirements: independent expert labels for rule explanations
no source-output access during final evaluation
